Drivers and initialization files for various IMU components, including accelerometers and magnetometers.

## Folders
- **[bma255](bma255/README.md)**: Driver and SPI communication interface for the BMA255 accelerometer with initialization, data handling, and configuration.
- **[bmi160](bmi160/README.md)**: Driver and SPI communication functions for the BMI160 IMU, with configuration and register definitions.
- **[bmm350](bmm350/README.md)**: Driver and header for BMM350 magnetometer initialization, data reading, and power management.
- **[lis3dh](lis3dh/README.md)**: I2C communication, driver implementation, and register definitions for the LIS3DH accelerometer.
- **[mag3110](mag3110/README.md)**: Driver implementation and initialization for the MAG3110 magnetometer.

## Files
- **[imu_asterix.c](imu_asterix.c.md)**: Stub functions for initializing, powering up, and powering down an IMU on the Asterix board.
- **[imu_qemu.c](imu_qemu.c.md)**: Initializes and manages IMU components with optional magnetometer support for QEMU environments.
- **[imu_silk.c](imu_silk.c.md)**: Initializes and manages IMU functions, including double tap detection, for non-QEMU targets.
- **[imu_snowy_evt.c](imu_snowy_evt.c.md)**: Initializes and manages IMU functions for the Snowy EVT board, with unused magnetometer stubs.
- **[imu_snowy_evt2.c](imu_snowy_evt2.c.md)**: Initializes and manages power for IMU devices using BMI160 and MAG3110 drivers.
- **[imu_tintin.c](imu_tintin.c.md)**: Initializes and manages power for accelerometer and magnetometer in the Pebble firmware.
- **[mag_null.c](mag_null.c.md)**: A null magnetometer driver for boards without a magnetometer, with stub functions for operations.
